tasks.instruction: Choose the correct answer A, B or C.

items.stem: Could you _________ the soup while I chop the vegetables?
The recipe says to _________ the eggs into a bowl and mix them with flour.
I'll have a _________ of cake, please — not too big.
Be careful — the _________ is very hot. Don't touch it without gloves.
Mum asked me to _________ some cheese on top of the pasta.
We bought a _________ of bread and a carton of milk from the shop.
